name: N-C- minimal medium + 5 mM glycerol (batch) (PMC7273699)
description: N-C- minimal medium + 5 mM glycerol (batch) — medium reported in PMC7273699, extracted for GrowthDB and mapped to BiGG.

provenance.citation: Medium composition from PMC7273699 (see GrowthDB record).
provenance.notes: Composition mapped to BiGG (mapper + salt dissociation); presence-based bounds; paper_amount retained. Added via GrowthDB curation.
provenance.verification: paper-verified (complete recipe; cited + supplementary sources chased)
provenance.verification_evidence: N−C− minimal medium (Csonka et al, 1994), containing K2SO4 (1 g), K2HPO4·3H2O (17.7 g), KH2PO4 (4.7 g), MgSO4·7H2O (0.1 g), and NaCl (2.5 g) per liter.
provenance.base_medium: N−C− minimal medium (Csonka LN, Ikeda TP, Fletcher SA, Kustu S, 1994, J Bacteriol 176:6324–6333)

sources_chased.what: base recipe cited as Csonka et al 1994 (N−C− minimal medium, J Bacteriol 176:6324–6333, PMC196974)
sources_chased.how: WebFetch PMC196974 (full text only as scanned page images, not OCR'd); cross-confirmed the identical salt recipe in two independent same-lab papers that reproduce N−C− verbatim (WebFetch PMC10477958 and this paper's Culture-medium section)

sources_chased.what: growth protocol reference Schink et al 2019 (Cell Systems 9:64–73) for batch-culture conditions / oxygenation
sources_chased.how: WebSearch confirmed same aerobic batch-culture N−C− protocol

recuration.notes: The medium is fully defined in the paper's 'Culture medium' section and is already complete at the ionic level: the current exchange list (Cl, glycerol, K, Mg, Na, NH4, O2, Pi, SO4) captures every species contributed by the five salts plus the N and C sources. N−C− minimal medium (Csonka/Kustu) is a phosphate-buffered defined salts medium that intentionally contains NO added trace-metal/micronutrient mix, NO CaCl2, and NO vitamins/thiamine — verified by convergent reproduction of the identical recipe in independent papers; growth relies on trace-metal contaminants. 1 mM IPTG was added 'when ne

uncovered.name: dipotassium hydrogen phosphate trihydrate
uncovered.note: no exchange auto-assigned; propose uptake -1.0 pending manual curation

oxygen_note: no oxygen requirement specified; O2 available but not asserted
